_comment: Websites built with Astro Stardrive. Add yours via a pull request: append an object with 'title', 'description' and 'url'. Entries are sorted alphabetically by title automatically, so order here does not matter. Requirement: your site must still expose the <meta name="generator" content="Astro Stardrive" /> tag (present by default) so it can be verified. No links to content unsuitable for children (e.g. gambling, sexual/pornographic, or alcohol-related).

sites.title: Astro Stardrive
sites.description: The official demo and home of the boilerplate itself - batteries included.

sites.title: Jens Kürschner - Personal Website
sites.description: Personal website of the Stardrive creator, showcasing his work and projects.

sites.title: Peltmonger Ventures
sites.description: The company behind the Astro Stardrive project.
